title: viola cucullifolia
intro: Viola cucullifolia, also known as the yellow pansy or yellow violet, is a species of flowering plant in the viola genus. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola cucullifolia include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
